nasb.text: I called to my lovers, but they deceived me; My priests and my elders perished in the city While they sought food to restore their strength themselves.

esv.text: “I called to my lovers, but they deceived me; my priests and elders perished in the city, while they sought food to revive their strength.

cnv.text: 我向我所愛的人呼求，他們卻欺騙我。 我的祭司和長老為了延續生命，尋找糧食的時候， 就在城中氣絕身亡了。

ccb.text: “我向情人们求助， 他们却欺骗我。 我的祭司和长老在觅食求生时， 倒毙在城中。
